threat_description: WAF logs show repeated requests to /search?q=1 UNION SELECT username, password FROM admin_users-- ; targeting a MySQL 5.7 backend.
IT department receives email impersonating Microsoft365 support requesting admin credentials to resolve a 'license compliance issue'. Email header shows sender domain as micros0ft-support.ru.

Network scanner detects CVE-2017-0144 (EternalBlue) being exploited across internal hosts. Lateral movement observed using admin shares (C$, ADMIN$). Mimikatz credential dump artifacts found on three workstations.
